calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Amend Distribution Of Cemetery Maintenance Fund And Etc.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Catherine Yee for and with (Petitioner) Gordon Woo.

The court noted that consents have been filed by Mr. Woo, Cynthia and Esther and stated that it has no questions. The Court granted the petition for instructions to amend distribution of cemetery maintenance fund, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
